hero.name: Sebastian Kolbusz
hero.tagline: Building immersive digital experiences with code and creativity.

bio.title: Sebastian Kolbusz
bio.description: Frontend engineer with over 6 years of experience building scalable SaaS products.

experience.label: Years in Craft
experience.details: Building scalable SaaS products with focus on DX and performance.

location.details: Working from the heart of the Tatra Mountains.

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.details: I value simplicity, explicitness, and pragmatic solutions. Engineering is a craft where predictable behavior is paramount.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.intro: I approach every project as a distinct engineering challenge, prioritizing scalable architecture and user-centric performance. My workflow combines pragmatic decision-making with a craftsman's attention to detail, ensuring that the final product is not just visually immersive but also robust, accessible, and easy to maintain. From rapid prototyping to production-grade SaaS, I build digital experiences that last.

zakofy.description: Premium private tours from Zakopane to the Tatra Mountains and Slovak highlands. Emphasizes exclusive, personalized mountain experiences including thermal baths, authentic highland culture, and breathtaking landscapes.

your-krakow-travel.description: All-inclusive private tours from Kraków to regional attractions. Premium, comfortable experiences with private vehicles, English-speaking drivers, and skip-the-line access to major sites.

highlights.0: Hero with aerial Wawel Castle photography

wellezza.description: Elegant landing page for a professional hair salon in Wieliczka, Poland. Showcases the team and services while driving bookings through integrated online scheduling.

highlights.3: Location & hours with embedded Google Map

billboard-zakopane.description: Business platform for a specialist in large-format billboard advertising in Zakopane and the Podhale region. Offers rental, installation, and graphic design for advertising structures.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Invest in Digital Assets, Not Just Code. I build systems that generate revenue, authority, and trust.

process.title: The Workflow
process.intro: A transparent, structured approach to every project.
